name: oreilly-claude-course
description: Skills and subagents for Tim Warner's O'Reilly Live Learning course 'Claude Code and Large-Context Reasoning'. Bundles the three repo-scoped skills (mcp-scaffold, review-changes, claude-md-audit) and all five teaching subagents (code-quality-coach, claude-code-tutor, python-mcp-expert, release-manager, terraform-architect) into one installable plugin.
